title: Balanced Search Trees and Order Statistics · Spiral Review
summary: Maintain an ordered index with predictable latency during sorted and mixed updates. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a balanced-tree trace and order-statistic extension after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace rotations while preserving binary-search order and reconnecting every affected link.
Maintain AVL heights and select single or double rotations from imbalance shape.
Use red-black color properties to bound height and guide update repair.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
